_comment: Full 18-week Disney walking-endurance plan. Encoded from disney_walking_master_plan.md and walk-plan-reference-data.json. Editable in Settings; an edited copy is stored as a localStorage override.

meta.goal: Two 20,000+ step park days with one recovery day between

phases.name: Base + Heat Management
phases.notes: Build daily steps 6,000 to 7,500. Walk early morning or after sunset. Heat management matters.

phases.name: Build
phases.notes: Saturday walks now outdoors in park shoes.

phases.name: Peak / Trip Simulation

mon.note: Moderate outdoor walk replaces the pad walk (second park day)

fri.note: Friday Routine A drops to 2 sets to manage fatigue

phases.notes: Weekend mimics the trip: hard Saturday, easy Sunday, moderate Monday.

weeks.progression: Full sets and reps as written
Vest may start on Mon/Wed pad walks, 5% bodyweight
Calf raises: move to single leg, 3 sets of 10 per leg
Deload strength: 2 sets instead of 3 all week. Buy park shoes now.
Wednesday walk moves outdoors when weather allows
Single leg calf raises: 3 sets of 12
Vest to 10% bodyweight on pad if knee is quiet
Balance on folded towel. Step ups: 3 sets of 10.
Add 2 or 3 deliberate 5 min standing stops during Sat walk
Single leg calf raises: 3 sets of 15
PEAK. Saturday dress rehearsal: park shoes, park socks, the bag you will carry.
Routines A and B once each, 2 sets. Daily steps 7,500.
Two 30 to 45 min easy walks. One Routine B, 2 sets. No hero walks. Arrive fresh.

exercises.name: Standing calf raises (straight knee)
exercises.cue: Pressure across the whole ball of the foot, biased to the big toe; heel rises straight up

exercises.name: Bent knee calf raises
exercises.cue: Knees bent ~20° held constant; targets the soleus

exercises.name: Tibialis raises
exercises.cue: Back against wall, heels 12in out, lift forefeet high

exercises.name: Step ups
exercises.cue: Low step 6–8in; raise height only if the knee is pain-free

exercises.name: Short foot holds
exercises.cue: Pull ball of foot toward heel, arch lifts, toes stay flat

exercises.name: Single leg balance
exercises.cue: Progress: eyes closed, then folded towel

exercises.name: Towel scrunches
exercises.cue: Scrunch the towel toward you with the toes

exercises.name: Lateral step downs
exercises.cue: Slow heel tap to the floor, stop short of knee pain range

exercises.name: Ankle alphabet
exercises.cue: Trace the alphabet with the foot

bike.name: Zone 2 spin
bike.note: Aerobic base and active recovery. Keep it easy, especially Sunday.

shoes.label: Beast (training)
shoes.notes: Stability, GuideRails, wide, for overpronation. Adrenaline GTS 25 is the lighter-support alternative.

shoes.label: Bondi 8 (park)
shoes.notes: Reserved. Break-in from Sept 1 on Saturday outdoor walks only.

shoes.label: Bondi 9 (blue)
shoes.notes: Blue pair, used for training walks.

shoes.label: House (OluKai)
shoes.notes: Supportive footbed to manage arch soreness on tile and hardwood.

milestones.label: Weighted vest may start on pad walks (week 3, 5% bodyweight)
Park shoes bought by end of week 6
Bondi 8 break-in begins on Saturday outdoor walks
Vest to 10% bodyweight on pad if the knee is quiet (week 9)
Peak dress rehearsal: park shoes, socks, and bag (week 15)

standingRules: Left knee sharp pain = stop that exercise. Aching that fades in 24h = fine. Growing week over week = see a PT.
Carbs before any walk over 45 min. Electrolytes on every outdoor walk.
Saturday long walks outdoors in park shoes from Sept 1.
Vest: pad only, 5–10% bodyweight, not on Saturday walks before October, off if the knee complains.
Hard floors at home: supportive house shoes, not barefoot. Routines on a mat, not tile.
Morning arch or heel pain, or shin pain that does not warm up in 10 min: pause and cut volume 50% for a week.

rules.kneeStopRule: If left knee pain reaches 3 of 5 during a walk, stop and log it. Do not push through in this phase.
